Hint:
  stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-s3-external-write/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-s3-external-write/observations

Next steps:

  2. View a summary: `stave apply --format text`
  3. Export findings to a file: `stave apply --format json > findings.json`
